category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a distributed open source package manager for C/C++; official repository and docs describe Conan as an open-source C and C++ package manager.
display_name_sources: Official homepage, docs, and GitHub README use Conan as the product name; source_facts.name is conan.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README lists Docs as https://docs.conan.io and says user documentation is there.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README lists Github as https://github.com/conan-io/conan and describes the project as the C/C++ package manager.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names C/C++ package management; official GitHub topics include c, package-manager, cmake, cplusplus, cpp, and conan.
